boat.name: Dirk II
boat.full_description: Her owner since 1994, Graham Benton, converted her back to the original gaff yawl design in 1997. Graham has, almost single-handed, returned a fine yacht that had lost her way almost to her original perfection. She participated in the America Cup Jubilee event in 2001 and in 2002 cruised Brittany for several months. Dirk II is a boat to watch in OGA races. At YOGAFF 2007 she sports a mizzen again.
boat.short_description: Built by A H Arp at Laboe in Germany to a Fife design in 1921, Dirk II featured in a book written by her then owner Hans Domizlaff about his cruises in the Baltic in the 1920s. She was converted to a Bermudian yawl, then a Bermudian ketch.
